content.en:
"Great, relying on those immortal golden marrow beads, I am about to refine the power of the transcendent dimension to the consummation realm!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

You must know that in the half-step transcendental realm, the superdimensional power can be tempered to the consummation realm, and only a very small number of half-step extradimensional realms can do it, and almost all of them are the descendants of some extradimensional realms and the demonic geniuses who are really focused on cultivating the top extradimensional forces.

In this way, a large amount of resources can be cultivated, so that the power of the transcendent dimension can be tempered to the perfection realm in the half-step transcendent realm.

Just like a force like the Six-Winged Family, at most cultivate one such a half-step transcendent realm, after all, treasures like the Immortal Golden Marrow Bead are too rare, even if the Six-Winged Family has a special place to cultivate, how many years does it take to cultivate so many Immortal Golden Marrow Beads!

It would be too rare for Ye Tian to completely rely on himself to refine the power of the transcendent dimension to the consummation realm.

Now, Ye Tian's super-dimensional power has been refined to the realm of perfection, and then he will focus on refining the super-dimensional body, only when the super-dimensional body is truly tempered and the physical body is completely transformed into a super-dimensional body, can he break through to the super-dimensional realm.

"In the Dragon Cave Ridge, I have also found some resources to assist in refining the superdimensional body, but the effect is definitely not as good as the superdimensional origin bead. "

Ye Tian thought so.

But if you don't have a superdimensional origin bead, it is also a very good choice to use these extradimensional resources to refine the superdimensional body for the time being.

In addition, he found that after the superdimensional power was tempered to the perfection realm, the efficiency of refining the superdimensional body had also increased several times, which was undoubtedly good news.

Even if he didn't have the Extradimensional Origin Bead, he relied on the extradimensional power of the Perfection Realm and a large number of auxiliary resources, and he was still able to refine the Transcendental Body to the Perfection Realm for a long enough time.

In fact, those powerhouses who broke through to the transcendent realm, they had absolutely not refined the superdimensional origin beads in the half-step transcendent realm, and most of them still relied on a large amount of time to refine little by little until they finally broke through.

......

Ice Ghost Organization Headquarters.

Many pinnacle realm gods gathered, and the big leader, the second leader, and the third leader Ziya realm gods were also here.

At the meeting, the Great Leader Ice Bee Realm God spoke: "Everyone, there is good news to announce, that is, I have broken through.!"

When many peak realm gods heard this, they were immediately surprised.

The Great Leader is already a peak realm god cultivator, if he breaks through again, wouldn't it be a half-step transcendent realm?

Rumble!!!

An incomparably powerful aura spread from the Ice Bee Realm God, which contained the power of extradimensional power.

Really.

Their big leader had already broken through, although he had just broken through to the half-step transcendent realm, his strength was far from being comparable to that of the peak realm gods.

Moreover, the Great Boss is extremely powerful at the peak realm god level, and once fused with the superdimensional bloodline of the half-step superdimensional realm superdimensional creature Ice Polar Beast, and his strength is extremely powerful, and now he has broken through to the half-step superdimensional realm, and his strength is absolutely crushing the ordinary half-step superdimensional realm.

It's just that the Grand Leader has no hope of becoming an extradimensional realm in the future.

But if you become a half-step extradimensional realm, as long as you don't provoke those powerful extradimensional forces, you can almost go sideways.

Moreover, their Ice Ghost Organization had never set foot in the Six Thousand Territory, so there was hardly any major danger.

"Congratulations to the Great Chief!"

"Congratulations to the Great Chief!"

"Congratulations to the Great Chief!"

At this time, the second leader said: "Great leader, you have broken through to the half-step transcendent realm, are you avenging the wind split?"

The Great Leader Ice Bee Realm God frowned slightly: "That Ye Heaven Realm God of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory has also comprehended the power of the transcendent dimension, and may have also impacted the half-step transcendent realm. It is not easy for a half-step extradimensional realm to deal with a half-step extradimensional realm, and that person who can break through to a half-step extradimensional realm in the weak territory of 7362 can be said to be very strange, if I go forward, I may not be able to kill the opponent, maybe there will be danger. "

In a word, he didn't really want to avenge the wind crack.

He has always been cautious, which is why he has survived to this day.

Before, the Ice Ghost Organization also thought that the territory of 7,362 was not strong, and the wind cracked their shot, but they were not able to capture it?

As a result, the whole army was wiped out.

Moreover, the Ice Ghost Organization had already failed twice in the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory, and he didn't want to fail three times.

The second leader saw that the big leader was unwilling to make a move, and he didn't say anything anymore.

If he had been able to argue with the big boss before, after all, the strength was almost the same, and the big leader would have listened to his opinion.

But now, the big leader has comprehended the power of the super-dimensional, and advanced to the half-step super-dimensional realm, in the eyes of the big leader, he is like an ant, so he naturally doesn't dare to say more.

But at this time, the God of the Ziya Realm said: "Great Chief, if you can buy a drop of the true blood of the Black Scale Domain Dragon for me, I will most likely be able to comprehend the power of the extra-dimensional, so as to advance to the half-step extra-dimensional realm, and at that time, with my ability, I can definitely kill the other party." That Ye Tianjie god is very demonic, maybe he has not fused with the superdimensional bloodline, but relied on himself to comprehend the superdimensional power, such a demon can break through to the superdimensional realm. If he breaks through to the extradimensional realm, and we offend him again, maybe he will find our headquarters and destroy us. "

The Ice Bee Realm God frowned, but did not refute the Ziya Realm God.

Indeed, Ye Tian may not have fused the superdimensional bloodline, if he relied on himself to comprehend the power of the superdimension, as long as he did not fall in the future, he would definitely become a superdimensional realm.

Such a demon must be erased in advance!

He was indeed not sure to kill Ye Tian, but if the Ziya Realm God broke through, it would be safe. []

He is very aware of the situation of the true body of the God of the Ziya Realm, once he breaks through to the half-step transcendent realm, his strength may not surpass him, but it is an extremely difficult existence, and it is impossible for him to help the God of the Ziya Realm, and the ability of the God of the Ziya Realm is very rebellious.

The god of the Ziya Realm fused with the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon, if he hadn't fused with other extra-dimensional bloodlines a long time ago (Li Zhao), otherwise he would definitely have to ask the God of the Ziya Realm for the method of transformation and fuse the bloodline of the Black Scale Domain Dragon.

Once this bloodline is fused, the will will will be transformed, and it can have incredible abilities, which can travel through the boundary extradimensional barrier and contact the creatures of other realms.

And once you break through to the half-step extradimensional realm, it will be even more terrifying, the true body of the god of the Ziya Realm can directly descend to other realms, you must know that the normal half-step extradimensional realm is impossible to shuttle through the boundary extradimensional barrier, only the extradimensional realm can be easily done.

However, the gods of the Ziya Realm can do this in a half-step transcendent realm.

In addition, once the half-step extradimensional realm is reached, the god of the Ziya Realm also has a terrifying extradimensional ability-the Black Scale Domain Realm, once the Black Scale Domain Realm is displayed, it can directly trap any half-step extradimensional realm, and suppress more than seventy percent of the opponent's strength.

If he joined forces with the Ziya Realm God, it would be enough to easily kill Ye Tian.
